mapper.insert: INSERT INTO main_branch_code1121 ( keyid, name, hs_code, remarks, add_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{keyid}, #{name}, #{hsCode}, #{remarks}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE main_branch_code1121 SET name = #{name}, hs_code = #{hsCode}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE keyid = #{keyid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO general_branch_code1024 ( keyid, name, hs_code, remarks, add_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{keyid}, #{name}, #{hsCode}, #{remarks}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE general_branch_code1024 SET name = #{name}, hs_code = #{hsCode}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE keyid = #{keyid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO result_hscode ( data_code, original_name, name, hs_code, remark, add_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{dataCode}, #{originalName}, #{name}, #{hsCode}, #{remark}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE result_hscode SET original_name = #{originalName}, name = #{name}, hs_code = #{hsCode}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE data_code = #{dataCode}
mapper.select: SELECT member_unit, member_unit_keyid, leading_unit, leading_unit_keyid, cooperation_type, province, remark, hs_code, add_time, update_time FROM haosen_medical_alliance WHERE member_unit_keyid = #{memberUnitKeyid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO haosen_medical_alliance ( member_unit, member_unit_keyid, leading_unit, leading_unit_keyid, cooperation_type, province, remark, hs_code, add_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{memberUnit}, #{memberUnitKeyid}, #{leadingUnit}, #{leadingUnitKeyid}, #{cooperationType}, #{province}, #{remark}, #{hsCode}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE haosen_medical_alliance SET member_unit = #{memberUnit}, member_unit_keyid = #{memberUnitKeyid}, leading_unit = #{leadingUnit}, leading_unit_keyid = #{leadingUnitKeyid}, cooperation_type = #{cooperationType}, province = #{province}, remark = #{remark}, hs_code = #{hsCode}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE member_unit_keyid = #{memberUnitKeyid}
mapper.select: SELECT member_unit, member_unit_keyid, leading_unit, leading_unit_keyid, cooperation_type, province, remark, hs_code, add_time, update_time FROM haosen_medical_community WHERE member_unit_keyid = #{memberUnitKeyid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO haosen_medical_community ( member_unit, member_unit_keyid, leading_unit, leading_unit_keyid, cooperation_type, province, remark, hs_code, add_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{memberUnit}, #{memberUnitKeyid}, #{leadingUnit}, #{leadingUnitKeyid}, #{cooperationType}, #{province}, #{remark}, #{hsCode}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE haosen_medical_community SET member_unit = #{memberUnit}, member_unit_keyid = #{memberUnitKeyid}, leading_unit = #{leadingUnit}, leading_unit_keyid = #{leadingUnitKeyid}, cooperation_type = #{cooperationType}, province = #{province}, remark = #{remark}, hs_code = #{hsCode}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE member_unit_keyid = #{memberUnitKeyid}
